Description: Australian growth-stage VC investing in technology and healthcare companies from Series A through pre-IPO. Writes cheques of $1m–$30m. Backs companies with product-market fit looking to scale into global markets.

Description: Leading national industry association representing businesses across manufacturing, engineering, construction, defence, ICT and more. Advocacy, IR advice, training and networking.
